title: The Future of Web Development in 2024
author: Awais Nawaz
excerpt: Explore the cutting-edge technologies and trends shaping the future of web development.
content: Web development continues to evolve at a rapid pace. In this article, we explore emerging technologies like AI integration, serverless architecture, and edge computing that are transforming how we build web applications.

title: Mastering React Hooks: A Complete Guide
author: Awais Nawaz
excerpt: Deep dive into React Hooks and learn how to write more efficient, reusable components.
content: React Hooks have revolutionized the way we write functional components. Learn about useState, useEffect, useContext, and how to create custom hooks to optimize your React applications.

title: Building Scalable APIs with Node.js
author: Awais Nawaz
excerpt: Best practices for designing and implementing scalable REST APIs with Node.js and Express.
content: Building scalable APIs is crucial for modern web applications. Discover best practices for error handling, database optimization, caching strategies, and deployment considerations.

title: CSS Grid vs Flexbox: When to Use Each
author: Awais Nawaz
excerpt: Understand the differences between CSS Grid and Flexbox and learn when to use each layout system.
content: CSS Grid and Flexbox are powerful layout tools. In this comprehensive guide, we compare their features, use cases, and demonstrate practical examples for modern responsive designs.

title: TypeScript Best Practices for Large Projects
author: Awais Nawaz
excerpt: Learn TypeScript best practices for building maintainable and scalable applications.
content: TypeScript brings static typing and powerful tooling to JavaScript. Explore best practices for type definitions, interfaces, generics, and architectural patterns for large-scale projects.
